creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of games/wmtimebomb

diff -urN games/wmtimebomb/pkg/DESCR.orig games/wmtimebomb/pkg/DESCR
--- games/wmtimebomb/pkg/DESCR.orig     Thu Jan 20 13:39:18 2000
+++ games/wmtimebomb/pkg/DESCR  Thu Jan 20 13:39:31 2000
@@ -4,3 +4,5 @@
 Usage: wmtimebomb -t <time> -b <bombs> -x <width> -y <height> -s -c -h
 -s will start timebomb with clock in its title
 -c will start timebomb with counter in its title
+
+WWW: http://www.maliwan.org/wmtimebomb.shtml
